title: Device Home Screen - Device Onboarding Screens
scenario: Verify onboarding screens display correctly for first-time connection of supported devices (Osprey/Tern/Emu), including navigation, fit test states, completion, and reappearance for a second supported device.
steps: Connect a supported device (Osprey/Tern/Emu) for the first time.
Verify the welcome popup is displayed.
Navigate through onboarding screens by swiping or tapping Next/Skip.
Verify content and animations match Figma designs.
Start a fit test from the onboarding flow.
Test all fit test states: pass both, pass one, fail both.
Complete the final screen using Done or User Guide buttons.
Pair a second supported device and verify onboarding appears again.
expected: Onboarding screens are displayed correctly for first-time device connections, content and animations match Figma designs, all fit test states work, and onboarding reappears when pairing a second supported device.
